subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Javad! Praise be unto God that thou hast drawn thy portion from the Ocean of Divine bounty, and His generosity hath embraced thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل جواد الحمد لله از دریای بخشش الهی قسمت بردی جودش مقبلین
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @contention and conflict, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @wisdom [hikmat]
